statement: Why do shoppers abandon carts after adding items they clearly want?
notes: Look for checkout surprise costs, promo confusion, and payment failures.

statement: What shipping and delivery issues are reducing customer trust after purchase?
notes: Capture delays, inaccurate delivery promises, and poor tracking communication.

statement: Why do customers describe returns as stressful or not worth the effort?
notes: Identify policy ambiguity, slow refunds, and support handoff failures.

statement: Why are first-time buyers disappointed when products arrive?
notes: Look for sizing mismatches, misleading photos, and poor quality consistency.

statement: What keeps satisfied one-time buyers from coming back for a second purchase?
notes: Find loyalty, assortment, and re-engagement frictions after first delivery.
